config.section.sip.desc: Native single-account SIP endpoint for calls and voice agents.
config.section.sip.label: SIP Phone
config.sip.browser_media_note: Uses authenticated WebRTC with PCMU on one UDP port. An empty bind address inherits the SIP bind address; V1 uses host candidates without STUN/TURN.
config.sip.description: Configure one SIP account, strict call allowlists, and the classic or Gemini Live voice backend.
config.sip.enable_first: Enable and save SIP before testing.
config.sip.password_required: Store a SIP password before testing.
config.sip.restart_required: Saved. Restart AuraGo to apply browser media changes.
config.sip.security_note: The SIP password remains in the Vault. Audio, RTP packets, complete SIP headers, and raw transcripts are not logged or stored.
config.sip.title: Native SIP Phone
config.sip.wizard.applied: Provider configured. You can now test registration.
config.sip.wizard.intro: Choose your provider and enter only the credentials that are actually required.
config.sip.wizard.no_results: No matching provider found. Use “Other phone system or SIP provider”.
config.sip.wizard.notice_account_server: Copy the SIP server and separate SIP password from the customer portal. Server values may vary by region or product.
config.sip.wizard.notice_device_password: Use the separate SIP or device password, not your web-account password.
config.sip.wizard.notice_fritzbox_phone: First create a LAN/Wi-Fi IP telephone in the FRITZ!Box and use its own username and SIP password.
config.sip.wizard.notice_pbx_credentials: Use the credentials of a dedicated SIP extension. The phone-system administrator password is not required.
config.sip.wizard.notice_router_recommen: Direct registration may depend on your plan and access line. Registering AuraGo as an IP phone on the local router is often more reliable.
config.sip.wizard.replace_confirm: I confirm that this preset may replace the existing account and network values.
config.sip.wizard.replace_required: Confirm replacement of the existing settings first.
config.sip.wizard.safe_registration: The account is initially registered in read-only mode. Incoming and outgoing calls remain blocked until you explicitly enable suitable allowlists and permissions.
config.sip.wizard.safe_title: Safe start without implicit call access
config.sip.wizard.search: Search for a provider or phone system
config.sip.wizard.title: What would you like to connect AuraGo to?
config.budget.models_moved_hint: Model budgets are now managed via Provider settings.
config.embeddings.change_warning_banner: ⚠️ Changing embeddings settings will reset the vector database. All existing memories will be lost!
config.embeddings.info_banner: Embeddings power long-term memory. Changes require a full rebuild of the vector database.
config.field.json_array_hint: Enter a JSON array, or a plain comma-separated list of values.
config.https.behind_proxy_notice: Behind reverse proxy detected – Security headers adjusted accordingly
config.https.connection_insecure: Insecure connection (HTTP) – Enable HTTPS for production use
config.llm.helper_disabled_banner: Helper LLM is disabled. Some features will be limited.
config.llm.helper_enabled_banner: Helper LLM is enabled and will be used for analysis and background tasks.
config.llm.helper_guardian_banner: LLM Guardian monitors and filters LLM inputs and outputs for safety.
config.llm.info_banner: Configure the main LLM that powers AuraGo. Model, API key and endpoint are managed via Provider settings.
config.llm.multimodal_banner: This model supports text and image inputs (multimodal).
config.output_compression.api_label: Traceback frame filtering and Python output deduplication.
config.output_compression.disabled_desc: Tool outputs will not be compressed.
config.output_compression.advanced_desc: Optional conservative filters for highly repetitive outputs.
config.output_compression.repetitive_des: Shortens repeated phrases in log-like outputs with a small dictionary.
config.output_compression.toon_desc: Converts homogeneous API arrays into a compact table.
config.output_compression.advanced_note: These filters fall back to the original output when they do not save space.
config.output_compression.filters_title: Error outputs are always preserved unchanged.
config.output_compression.info_desc: Oversized outputs are truncated first, then compressed to save 40-70% tokens.
config.output_compression.min_chars_desc: Only compress outputs exceeding this size (default: 500).
config.output_compression.note_limit: Null-field removal and JSON compaction for API responses.
config.output_compression.preserve_error: Outputs containing error markers will never be compressed.
config.output_compression.python_label: Git, Docker, kubectl, go test, pytest, grep, find, ls/tree filters.
config.output_compression.shell_label: Select which filter categories are active. Disabled categories use the generic filter.
config.restart.disconnected: Disconnected – waiting for AuraGo to restart…
config.restart.reloading: AuraGo is reloading. This page will refresh automatically.
config.save_bar.restart_needed: Saved – restart required to apply changes
config.section.output_compression.desc: Reduces token consumption by filtering and deduplicating tool outputs.
config.section.output_compression.label: Output Compression
config.security.title: Security Status
config.tools.warning_banner: ⚠️ These toggles control potentially dangerous capabilities. Only enable what you need.
config.section.heartbeat.label: Heartbeat
config.section.heartbeat.desc: Background wake-up scheduler that periodically checks for tasks, appointments, and emails.
config.heartbeat.additional_prompt_place: e.g. Also check system logs for critical errors...
config.heartbeat.info_banner: Heartbeat wakes the agent in configured time windows to check in the background if anything needs attention.
help.heartbeat.enabled: Enable the heartbeat scheduler to wake the agent periodically.
help.heartbeat.check_tasks: Check for open tasks and missions during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.check_appointments: Check for upcoming appointments and reminders during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.check_emails: Check configured email accounts for new messages during each heartbeat.
help.heartbeat.additional_prompt: Custom instructions for the agent to consider on every heartbeat wake-up.
help.heartbeat.day_time_window: Daytime period with its own check interval.
help.heartbeat.night_time_window: Nighttime period with its own (usually longer) check interval.
config.docker.managed_disabled_reason: Docker integration is disabled. Enable Docker before using managed Ollama containers.
config.docker.socket_missing_reason: Docker socket not detected. Mount /var/run/docker.sock or configure docker.host before using managed Ollama containers.
config.yepapi.enabled_hint: Activate the YepAPI integration for SEO, SERP, scraping, and social media tools.
config.yepapi.seo_hint: Keyword research, domain overview, competitor analysis, backlinks, and on-page audits.
config.yepapi.serp_hint: Search engine results from Google, Bing, Yahoo, Baidu, and more.
config.yepapi.scraping_hint: Standard scrape, JavaScript rendering, stealth mode, screenshots, and AI extraction.
config.yepapi.youtube_hint: Search videos, get details, transcripts, comments, channels, playlists, and trending.
config.yepapi.tiktok_hint: Search videos and users, get profiles, posts, comments, music, and challenges.
config.yepapi.instagram_hint: Search users and hashtags, get profiles, posts, reels, comments, and hashtags.
config.yepapi.amazon_hint: Search products, get details by ASIN, read reviews, browse deals and best sellers.
config.yepapi.provider_desc: Select the provider that supplies your YepAPI key. The provider must be configured with type 'yepapi'.
config.yepapi.provider_help: If empty, the first provider with type 'yepapi' will be used automatically.
config.yepapi.disabled_desc: Enable YepAPI to access SEO, SERP, scraping, and social media tools.
config.yepapi.test_desc: Verify your YepAPI key is valid and the service is reachable.
config.yepapi.test_success: Connection successful — API key is valid.
config.yepapi.test_error: Connection failed — check your API key and provider settings.
config.yepapi.provider_info: YepAPI can also be used as an LLM provider. Configure it in the Providers section with type 'yepapi'.
help.agent.discover_tools_snapshot_ttl_m: How long temporary discover_tools snapshots stay available. Values <=0 use the 5 minute default.
config.section.dograh.label: Dograh
config.section.dograh.desc: Managed Dograh workflow automation stack and MCP bridge
config.dograh.mcp_server_tool_label: Allow Dograh to call AuraGo MCP
config.dograh.disabled_desc: Enable Dograh to manage the local stack or connect to an external Dograh API.
config.dograh.sidecar_note: Managed mode starts PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, Dograh API and Dograh UI containers.
config.dograh.admin_setup_required: Create an API key in Dograh, then store it here.
config.dograh.webhook_token_hint: Webhook token created. Copy it into Dograh now; AuraGo will not show it again.
help.dograh.enabled: Shows Dograh in AuraGo and enables stack, MCP and webhook helpers.
help.dograh.api_key: Dograh API key from the Dograh UI. AuraGo stores it only in the Vault and sends it as X-API-Key.
help.dograh.api_url: Base URL AuraGo uses for Dograh API calls and the /api/v1/mcp/ endpoint.
help.dograh.ui_url: Browser URL opened from the integrations drawer for the Dograh UI.
help.dograh.mode: Managed starts the Dograh Docker stack. External connects to an existing Dograh API.
help.dograh.readonly: Blocks AuraGo helper actions that create or modify Dograh resources.
help.dograh.auto_start: Starts the managed Dograh stack automatically when AuraGo starts.
help.dograh.telemetry_enabled: Allows Dograh upstream telemetry. Keep disabled for private home-lab deployments.
help.dograh.mcp_client_enabled: Adds Dograh as a runtime MCP server so the agent can call Dograh tools.
help.dograh.mcp_server_tool_enabled: Allows AuraGo to register its authenticated /mcp endpoint as a Dograh tool.
help.dograh.credential_uuid: Credential UUID created in Dograh for the AuraGo MCP Bearer token.
help.dograh.allowed_tools: Optional comma-separated AuraGo MCP tools Dograh may call.
help.dograh.webhook_slug: AuraGo webhook path used for callbacks sent from Dograh workflows.
help.dograh.host: Network interface for managed Dograh ports. 127.0.0.1 keeps them local.
help.dograh.api_host_port: Host port mapped to the managed Dograh API container.
help.dograh.ui_host_port: Host port mapped to the managed Dograh UI container.
config.realtime_speech.clear_key_help: The key is removed only when you save.
config.realtime_speech.description: Configure live voice profiles separately from regular LLM providers.
config.realtime_speech.key_keep_placehol: Leave blank to keep the stored key
config.realtime_speech.key_stored: API key stored in the Vault
config.realtime_speech.master_enabled_he: Makes configured live speech profiles available in chat and on the virtual desktop.
config.realtime_speech.no_profiles: No realtime speech profiles configured yet.
config.realtime_speech.park_after_help: Between 5 and 60 seconds. Local voice detection remains active while parked.
config.realtime_speech.park_invalid: Parking time must be a whole number between 5 and 60 seconds.
config.realtime_speech.profile_invalid: Every profile needs a unique ID and a name.
config.realtime_speech.security_note: API keys are stored only in the Vault and are never sent to browser storage or the chat context.
config.realtime_speech.title: Realtime Speech
config.section.realtime_speech.desc: Independent profiles for low-latency voice agents.
config.section.realtime_speech.label: Realtime Speech
config.embeddings.benchmark_ok: The fastest reliable backend was selected.
